title: Position Paper on Regulating Fixed Point to Point Links and Point to Multipoint Systems
summary: Sets TRA’s approach to licensing and regulating fixed point-to-point and point-to-multipoint radio systems, supporting interference control and efficient spectrum use.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.spectrum: Regulatory position for fixed wireless links and point-to-multipoint systems.

notes: Related instruments: Related to National Frequency Plan 2024 and frequency licensing procedures
